name: parallel-workspaces
description: Isolated browser workspaces for AI agents — Windows-first desktop tool

scripts.control:google: npm run build && node dist/apps/desktop/control-test.js google
scripts.control:youtube: npm run build && node dist/apps/desktop/control-test.js youtube
scripts.control:open-google: npm run build && node dist/apps/desktop/control-test.js open-google
scripts.control:open-youtube: npm run build && node dist/apps/desktop/control-test.js open-youtube
